parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sn_users WHERE created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '24h') AS new_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sn_users) AS total_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sn_search_analytics WHERE created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '24h') AS searches_today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sn_code_generations WHERE created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '24h') AS code_gens_today, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM sn_payments WHERE status='active' AND created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '24h') AS revenue_today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sn_payments WHERE status='active') AS active_subs, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sn_error_logs WHERE resolved=false) AS open_errors

INSERT INTO sn_health_snapshots (cpu_usage,memory_usage,db_connections,active_users,searches_last_hour,errors_last_hour,created_at) SELECT 0,0, (SELECT count(*) FROM pg_stat_activity), $1, $2, $3, NOW()
